problem: Reverse-engineer 64keys.com chart combination features (interaction, penta, multichart, transits) and build comprehensive Human Design ontology to enable ergonomic multi-chart calculations during Rebecca's consultation sessions

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
